values.value: Searches Salesforce Knowledge articles using SOSL

[ { "name": "searchQuery", "type": "string", "required": false, "help": "Search query string for finding knowledge articles", "label": "Search Query" }, { "name": "articleId", "type": "salesforce-id", "required": false, "help": "Specific Knowledge Article Version ID to retrieve", "label": "Article ID" }, { "name": "language", "type": "string", "required": false, "help": "Language code for articles (e.g., en_US)", "label": "Language", "placeholder": "en_US" }, { "name": "includeDrafts", "type": "boolean", "required": false, "help": "Include draft articles in search results", "label": "Include Drafts" }, { "name": "includeBody", "type": "boolean", "required": false, "help": "Include article body content in results", "label": "Include Body" }, { "name": "maxResults", "type": "integer", "required": false, "help": "Maximum number of articles to return", "label": "Max Results", "minValue": 1, "maxValue": 50 } ]
